name: Spinach Loaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop the spinach.
2. Add the chopped spinach to a bowl with the other ingredients: cooked brown rice, chopped celery, and wheat germ.
3. Pour the mixture into a greased loaf pan.
4. Bake at 400°F (200°C) for 30 minutes.
5. Swiss chard can be substituted for spinach.
6. Serves 2.
Vegetarian Persuasion/Canadian Natural Hygiene Society/MM by DEEANNE
